ocr_findings.description: 'コレが出る！' banner icon rendered as 'つなが出る！' in OCR — stylised mascot text partially misread, cosmetic only

reviewer_notes: Exam page with 3 questions (問題9-1 through 9-3) with ア/イ/ウ/エ choices plus 解答・解説 for 9-1. All answer choice letters are present and correct. Question text, year annotations (平成25年度 etc.), and answer keys (問題9-1 イ, 9-2 イ, 9-3 ウ) all faithfully captured.
